prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约616→764→969→1223→1688名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1072名，2025年基准位次约1688名，后移幅度较前几年明显加大；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为19人，2023–2025年均为20人；2026年计划大幅增至33人，较2025年扩招65%，为近年最大幅度扩招，显著增加了招生名额供给，对位次产生明显的后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学（含医学院）为985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年排名第3，属全国顶尖层次，对考生有持续强吸引力；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端与校园安全事件，但抖音综合热度排名第14（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学为A级学科，基础医学A-，药学A+，口腔医学依托临床医学A级实力，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业持续高热推荐，2024年临床医学（推荐），口腔医学72.31（推荐），报考热度不减；河北省物理类考生2025年约36.3万人，2026年估算约36.6万人（按近年物理类占比约60%估算），考生规模微增约0.8%，竞争略有加剧；省控线（物理类本科批）从2021年412分逐年升至2025年459分，反映整体竞争水平上升；浙江大学医学院位于浙江省杭州市，属长三角核心城市，地域吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招65%是主导因素（显著推高位次数字），同时医学类专业持续高热、考生规模微增及省控线上行均指向竞争加剧，但声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用。，预测2026年最低位次约2366名，区间2082–2650名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（含临床医学专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（儿科方向，5+3一体化）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 基础医学（智慧创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班类（含临床医学、口腔医学专业）
- 药学（含智能药学卓越班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2082–2650名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<2082名）可重点冲击一档的临床医学（5+3一体化）和巴德年医学班；位次接近区间上限（>2650名）建议以三档的医学试验班类和药学为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 616 → 764 → 969 → 1223 → 1688, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1072 places in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1688, and the backward shift has significantly accelerated compared to previous years. The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 19 students in 2021–2022, and 20 students in 2023–2025. In 2026, the plan sharply increases to 33 students, an expansion of 65% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing the supply of admission slots and exerting obvious downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University (including its School of Medicine) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 3rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier nationally, and continues to have strong appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents. However, its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 14th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, and overall attention remains high. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Clinical Medicine is an A-level discipline, Basic Medicine is A-, Pharmacy is A+, and Stomatology relies on the A-level strength of Clinical Medicine. The disciplinary strength is top nationally, exerting strong attraction for high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended. In 2024, Clinical Medicine (recommended) and Stomatology 72.31 (recommended) maintain high application heat. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province is about 363,000 in 2025, estimated at about 366,000 in 2026 (based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60%), a slight increase of about 0.8%, indicating slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has risen from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, reflecting an overall increase in competition level. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the dominant factor of a 65% expansion in 2026 (significantly pushing up ranking numbers), along with the sustained high popularity of medical majors, a slight increase in candidate numbers, and the upward trend of the provincial control line all point to intensified competition, while the somewhat negative reputation has a slight inhibitory effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 2366, with a range of 2082–2650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Ba De Nian Medical Class) (including Clinical Medicine major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (Pediatrics Direction, 5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Basic Medicine (Smart Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (including Clinical Medicine and Stomatology majors)
- Pharmacy (including Intelligent Pharmacy Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2082–2650, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2082), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and the Ba De Nian Medical Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2650), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors such as Medical Experimental Class and Pharmacy to ensure admission.
